IntakeDashboard

span.p:
Agent 1 — Intake and Classification
IntakeClassificationAgent
extract_requirements()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Agent 2 — Evidence Retrieval RAG
EvidenceRetrievalAgent
retrieve() and index_case_document()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Agent 3 — Policy Reasoning and Gap Analysis
PolicyReasoningAgent
assess_requirements()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Agent 4 — Reviewer Summary and Communication
ReviewerSummaryAgent
draft_provider_communication()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Agent 5 — Workflow and Audit
WorkflowAgent
route_case() and check_readiness()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
completeness_pipeline
run_completeness_pipeline()
Orchestrates A2 then A3 then persist then advance status
